CustomField.description: Concatenated key assigned via price rule and used to query/return the correct Billing Schedule mdt record: Contract_Year__c + “ “ + SBQQ__BillingFrequency__c+ "-" + Quote__r.Number_of_Days_In_Advance__c + “-” + Num_Invoices_Per_Year__c
CustomField.label: Billing Schedule Lookup Key
